title: Panache dprint plugin configuration
description: Configuration for the Panache dprint Wasm plugin (Quarto, Pandoc, R Markdown, Markdown).

flavor.description: Markdown flavor to parse and format. Path-based detection (.qmd -> quarto, .rmd/.rmarkdown -> rmarkdown) takes precedence over this value.

blankLines.description: How to handle consecutive blank lines: keep them as written or collapse runs to a single blank line.

mathIndent.description: Number of spaces used to indent display-math content.

tabStops.description: How to handle tab characters used as indentation.

lineWidth.description: Maximum line width before wrapping. Defaults to dprint's global lineWidth, or 80 if unset.

tabWidth.description: Number of spaces per indentation level. Defaults to dprint's global indentWidth, or 4 if unset.
